title: TrainingRelationshipType
description: The relationship of the worker trainee with the Employer or Contractee Organization.

id.description: Provides a unique identifier to a specific work training relationship.

typeCode.description: The type of work training relationship between the Employer or Contractee Organization and the worker. Options are Internship, Externship, Apprenticeship.

status.description: Status of the work training relationship between the Employer or Contractee Organization and the Worker.

trainingAgreements.description: The work taining agreements for a work training relationship.
